raw_responses.title: Mantis shrimp — Wikipedia
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: 12-16 photoreceptor types covering 300-720nm + polarization; channel-independent encoding.

raw_responses.title: Frequency Dynamic Convolution (FDW, CVPR 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: Fourier Disjoint Weight learns spectral coefficients divided into frequency-based groups with disjoint Fourier indices; iDFT recovers spatial weights.

raw_responses.title: Beyond Position: emergence of wavelet-like properties in Transformers (ACL 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: attention heads exhibit wavelet-like band specialization across frequency.

raw_responses.title: Frequency Band Attention Mechanism (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: per-band heads specialize to different band subgroups; outputs of independent band-specific modules merged via learnable gates.

raw_responses.title: FNet: Mixing Tokens with Fourier Transforms (2021)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: replaces self-attention with parameter-free 2D FFT mixing across token and channel axes.

raw_responses.title: Spectral-Slice Multi-Head Attention with Disjoint DCT Bands (2026/03)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: K disjoint DCT bands assigned to K specialist heads; no intra-layer cross-band interaction; merged via late aggregator.

raw_responses.title: Band-Disjoint Specialist Heads for Long-Context Transformers (2025/11)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: frequency-disjoint heads avoid inter-head softmax-temperature interference.

raw_responses.title: Wavelet-Banded Multi-Head Attention (2026/04)
